name: MiMo Code

form_factor.comment: Docs describe the same experience in terminal, desktop app, and IDE extensions; CLI install is via curl or npm. Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://mimo.xiaomi.com/mimocode/install; IDE: https://mimo.xiaomi.com/mimocode/start; Extension: https://mimo.xiaomi.com/mimocode/start.

released_in.comment: GitHub shows v0.1.0 as the first public release on 2026-06-10.

latest_major_update.comment: Latest public release captured for this row is v0.1.1 on 2026-06-15.

rules.comment: Rules support includes AGENTS.md plus Claude Code fallback conventions such as project CLAUDE.md and global ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md.

skills.comment: Official docs list skills in customization and describe reusable skills for team workflows.

hooks.comment: Docs highlight plugins and inherited OpenCode capabilities, but a first-class lifecycle hook page was not found in public MiMo docs reviewed.

mcp_servers.comment: CLI has `mimo mcp add/list/auth/logout/debug` commands for local and remote MCP servers.

custom_commands.comment: Config files include a `command` object for custom command templates; built-in slash commands are documented separately.

goal_command.comment: README documents `/goal` with an independent judge model evaluating whether the stop condition is satisfied.

subagents.comment: README documents on-demand subagents with shared context, parallel work, lifecycle tracking, cancellation, and background execution.

model_selection.comment: CLI supports `--model/-m`; config and auth docs also route through Models.dev/provider configuration.

approval_mode.comment: Permission rules resolve to allow, ask, or deny; run mode also exposes `--dangerously-skip-permissions`.

sandbox_mode.comment: Permission config can constrain external directories and tools, but no separate container/filesystem sandbox mode was found.

resume.comment: Sessions can resume by explicit ID with `mimo --session <id>`.

continue.comment: Most recent session can be continued with `mimo --continue`.

non_interactive.comment: `mimo run [message..]` provides command-line execution outside the TUI.

output_format.comment: `mimo run` supports formatted output or raw JSON events via `--format`.

statusline.comment: TUI is documented, but no user-configurable status line support was found in docs reviewed.

telemetry.comment: Environment variable docs include diagnostics/internal categories, but no explicit telemetry opt-in/out policy was found in docs reviewed.

custom_model_provider.comment: README documents custom OpenAI-compatible providers in the TUI; auth docs support configuring API keys for providers from Models.dev.

notes: MiMo Code is a Xiaomi MiMo open-source terminal coding agent forked from OpenCode, adding cross-session memory, checkpoints, subagent orchestration, goal-driven loops, compose workflows, and dream/distill self-improvement.

pricing.value: Free open source; hosted MiMo services optional
pricing.comment: Source code is MIT-licensed. README says MiMo Auto is free for a limited time and hosted services are subject to Xiaomi MiMo terms.

some_free_usage.comment: README documents MiMo Auto as a free-for-limited-time anonymous channel.

no_account_required.comment: README lists MiMo Auto as anonymous and zero configuration.

can_use_other_subscriptions.comment: First-launch options include importing Claude Code authentication and custom OpenAI-compatible provider setup.

hosted_agent.comment: Public README describes a terminal-native assistant; no managed cloud-hosted agent workspace was found.

transcripts.comment: MiMo persists every conversation as a session, with session data saved under MIMOCODE_HOME/data.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Keybinds page documents configurable keybindings, disabling keybinds, leader key behavior, and prompt shortcuts.

theme_customization.comment: Slash commands include `/themes`; docs also list Themes under Customize.

auto_save.comment: Conversation/session persistence is automatic; no separate general file auto-save setting was found.

debugging_output.comment: Global flags include `--print-logs` and `--log-level` with DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR.

context_window.comment: Context compaction can be configured with auto/prune/reserved token buffer, but docs do not expose arbitrary model context-window sizing.

code_formatting.comment: Config files include a formatter object for code formatters.

git_integration.comment: README says MiMoCode can manage Git.

performance_mode.comment: Compaction/pruning settings optimize context usage; no broader named performance mode was found.

ui_customization.comment: Themes and keybindings are customizable, but no documented layout/sidebar/panel customization was found.
